domain: Antlion conical sand-trap — pit walls at critical angle of repose; any perturbation causes passive avalanche toward center; trap maintained by sand-throwing.
specific_mechanism: Passive instability outside basin + active maintenance via low-amplitude probe to keep critical-angle landscape.
llm_application: REPOSE-LANDSCAPE: passive funnel loss-landscape regularizer. Loss surface is augmented with a 'repose-angle' term that maintains a critical-angle slope toward a designated desired-state minimum throughout the parameter null-space. Ongoing low-amplitude SGD-style probe keeps the basin boundary at repose angle. Parameters perturbed outside basin slide back passively without active intervention.
novelty_claim: SafeGrad uses active null-space projection. GPAS preserves gradients via activation scaling. SAM seeks flat minima. REPOSE-LANDSCAPE differs by PASSIVE landscape sculpting via ongoing low-amplitude probe maintaining critical-angle slope — a self-restoring basin geometry rather than active correction.
